'''âk-ch-t''' ('''kakachat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hirple|hirple]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ch-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hirple|hirple]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-ch-t
|-
! Lemma
| kakachat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikachat|thikachat]] || [[word:jikachat|jikachat]] || [[word:shikachat|shikachat]] || [[word:kikachat|kikachat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukachat|thuthukachat]] || [[word:jujukachat|jujukachat]] || [[word:shushukachat|shushukachat]] || [[word:kukukachat|kukukachat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukachat|thukachat]] || [[word:jukachat|jukachat]] || [[word:shukachat|shukachat]] || [[word:kukachat|kukachat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukachat|thukachat]] || [[word:jukachat|jukachat]] || [[word:shukachat|shukachat]] || [[word:kukachat|kukachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekachat|thekachat]] || [[word:jekachat|jekachat]] || [[word:shekachat|shekachat]] || [[word:kekachat|kekachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokachat|thothokachat]] || [[word:jojokachat|jojokachat]] || [[word:shoshokachat|shoshokachat]] || [[word:kokokachat|kokokachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokachat|thokachat]] || [[word:jokachat|jokachat]] || [[word:shokachat|shokachat]] || [[word:kokachat|kokachat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokachat|thokachat]] || [[word:jokachat|jokachat]] || [[word:shokachat|shokachat]] || [[word:kokachat|kokachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkachat|thĂŠkachat]] || [[word:jĂŠkachat|jĂŠkachat]] || [[word:shĂŠkachat|shĂŠkachat]] || [[word:kĂŠkachat|kĂŠkachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakachat|thathakachat]] || [[word:jajakachat|jajakachat]] || [[word:shashakachat|shashakachat]] || [[word:kakakachat|kakakachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakachat|thakachat]] || [[word:jakachat|jakachat]] || [[word:shakachat|shakachat]] || [[word:kakachat|kakachat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakachat|thakachat]] || [[word:jakachat|jakachat]] || [[word:shakachat|shakachat]] || [[word:kakachat|kakachat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakachat|shakachat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakachat|goshakachat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakachat|gokishakachat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakachatnĂŒ|shakachatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakachatnknĂŒ|goshakachatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakachatnĂŒ|gokishakachatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakachatshĂ«|shakachatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakachatnkshĂ«|goshakachatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakachatshĂ«|gokishakachatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakachatro|shakachatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakachatnkro|goshakachatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakachatro|gokishakachatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakachatmu|shakachatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakachatnkmu|goshakachatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakachatmu|gokishakachatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakachatsher|shakachatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakachatnksher|goshakachatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakachatsher|gokishakachatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakachatng|shakachatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakachatnkng|goshakachatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakachatng|gokishakachatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakachatya|shakachatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakachatnkya|goshakachatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakachatya|gokishakachatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakachatyam|shakachatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakachatnkyam|goshakachatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakachatyam|gokishakachatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakachatnĂŒshĂ«|shakachatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakachatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshakachatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakachatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishakachatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakachatnĂŒro|shakachatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakachatnknĂŒro|goshakachatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakachatnĂŒro|gokishakachatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakachatnĂŒmu|shakachatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakachatnknĂŒmu|goshakachatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakachatnĂŒmu|gokishakachatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakachatshĂ«nĂŒ|shakachatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakachatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakachatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakachatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakachatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakachatshĂ«ro|shakachatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakachatnkshĂ«ro|goshakachatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakachatshĂ«ro|gokishakachatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakachatshĂ«mu|shakachatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakachatnkshĂ«mu|goshakachatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakachatshĂ«mu|gokishakachatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakachatronĂŒ|shakachatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakachatnkronĂŒ|goshakachatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakachatronĂŒ|gokishakachatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakachatroshĂ«|shakachatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakachatnkroshĂ«|goshakachatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakachatroshĂ«|gokishakachatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakachatromu|shakachatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakachatnkromu|goshakachatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakachatromu|gokishakachatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakachatmunĂŒ|shakachatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakachatnkmunĂŒ|goshakachatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakachatmunĂŒ|gokishakachatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakachatmushĂ«|shakachatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakachatnkmushĂ«|goshakachatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakachatmushĂ«|gokishakachatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakachatmuro|shakachatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakachatnkmuro|goshakachatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakachatmuro|gokishakachatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
